accessExpired.title: Access outside stay period
accessExpired.lead: Your dashboard access is only valid during your stay (between check-in and check-out). Contact the team if you need help.

login.subtitleCorp: Access the dashboard with your work email.
login.subtitleSignUp: Create your account with email and password to access the dashboard.
login.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

dashboard.lead: Your digital stay guide in one place: reservation, property access, Wi‑Fi and service requests.

reservation.title: Your reservation
reservation.lead: Address, unit, dates, Wi‑Fi and access instructions — everything you need for your stay.
reservation.cardCodeMeta: Have it ready if you contact support

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.lead: Request services during your stay. Your history is saved to your account.
servicesPage.sectionHistoryLead: Each request and its current status.
servicesPage.historyAria: Requests table: service, status and date
servicesPage.historyEmpty: No requests yet. Pick a service above to create your first one.
servicesPage.errorListen: Could not load history. Check your connection and Firestore rules.
servicesPage.errorCreate: Could not submit the request. Please try again.
servicesPage.errorUpdate: Could not mark as complete. Please try again.
servicesPage.errorDelete: Could not delete the request. Please try again.
servicesPage.hint: Requests are stored in the serviceRequests collection, linked to your account.

cleaning.title: Extra cleaning
cleaning.description: Full or partial apartment cleaning during your stay.

linen.title: Linens & towels
linen.description: Fresh sheets, towels or extra amenities.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Issues with appliances, water, power or air conditioning.

concierge.title: Concierge
concierge.description: Local tips, transport or special requests.

placeholders.settingsDesc: Language, terms and basic guest preferences.
